query:
-- Link CommsCode numbers to customerExternalId by matching customerName
UPDATE phone_numbers pn
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT customerName, customerExternalId
  FROM services
  WHERE customerName IN (
    'Action Smart Group', 'Air Restore', 'Australian Computer Traders',
    'CPM', 'Envest', 'Gateway', 'Salter Brothers Luxury Collection',
    'Smile IT', 'Spicers Retreats and Hotels', 'Wineology'
  )
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
) s ON pn.customerName = s.customerName
SET pn.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE pn.provider = 'CommsCode'
  AND (pn.customerExternalId IS NULL OR pn.customerExternalId = '');

-- Link CommsCode numbers to customerExternalId by matching customerName
UPDATE phone_numbers pn
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT customerName, customerExternalId
  FROM services
  WHERE customerName IN (
    'Action Smart Group', 'Air Restore', 'Australian Computer Traders',
    'CPM', 'Envest', 'Gateway', 'Salter Brothers Luxury Collection',
    'Smile IT', 'Spicers Retreats and Hotels', 'Wineology'
  )
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
) s ON pn.customerName = s.customerName
SET pn.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE pn.provider = 'CommsCode'
  AND (pn.customerExternalId IS NULL OR pn.customerExternalId = '');
